scripts.dev:d1: npm run d1:migrate:local && npm run cf:build && wrangler pages dev .vercel/output/static --persist-to .wrangler/state --port 3000 --env-file .env.local
scripts.d1:tables:local: wrangler d1 execute rolelens-db --local --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;"
scripts.d1:tables:remote: wrangler d1 execute rolelens-db --remote --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;"
scripts.d1:auth-users:local: wrangler d1 execute rolelens-db --local --command "SELECT id, email, name, created_at FROM auth_users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;"
scripts.d1:auth-sessions:local: wrangler d1 execute rolelens-db --local --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS session_count FROM auth_sessions;"
